title: Core Game Architecture

classes.name: Vars
methods: loadAsync(): void  // implements Loadable; calls loadSettings() + init()
static init(): void  // instantiates ALL subsystems, loads mods & maps
static loadSettings(): void  // sets up arc Settings, keybinds, locale
classes.notes: init() is the bootstrap: creates ContentLoader, GameState, World, Logic, Maps, Mods, etc. in order.

classes.name: ClientLauncher
methods: setup(): void  // calls checkLaunch, loadLogger, sets up AssetManager, batch, adds subsystems
update(): void  // manages asset loading progress; after finish fires ClientLoadEvent
init(): void  // inherited from ApplicationCore - wires subsystems
classes.notes: Abstract; platform-specific subclasses (DesktopLauncher, AndroidLauncher, IOSLauncher) extend this.

classes.name: ContentLoader
key_fields: contentNameMap: ObjectMap<String, MappableContent>[]  // indexed by ContentType.ordinal()
nameMap: ObjectMap<String, MappableContent>  // global name lookup
temporaryMapper: MappableContent[][]  // used during save load for ID remapping
methods: createBaseContent(): void  // loads Items, Liquids, Bullets, UnitTypes, Blocks, Planets, TechTrees, etc.
init(): void  // calls Content#init(), Content#postInit(), logicVars.init(), fires ContentInitEvent
blocks(), items(), liquids(), units(), bullets(), planets(), weathers(), sectors(), etc.
classes.notes: Central registry. All Content subclasses register themselves here on construction via handleContent/handleMappableContent.

classes.name: Logic
methods: Logic()  // registers all event listeners (BlockDestroyEvent, WorldLoadEvent, PlayEvent, WaveEvent, etc.)
update(): void  // main game loop: updates universe, ticks, teams, fog, waves, entities
dispose(): void  // saves admin list and settings
play(): void  // sets state=playing, resets stats, fires PlayEvent, distributes starting items
reset(): void  // recreates GameState, clears groups, fires ResetEvent
runWave(): void  // calls spawner.spawnEnemies(), increments wave, fires WaveEvent
static sectorCapture()  // @Remote(server): fires SectorCaptureEvent, saves sector
private checkGameState(): void  // evaluates win/loss conditions, fires GameOverEvent
private updateWeather(): void  // cycles weather effects
event_subscriptions: SectorCaptureEvent → floor replacements, planet generator callback
WaveEvent / GameOverEvent / UnitCreateEvent / UnitDestroyEvent → campaign stats
classes.notes: Does NOT store game state itself; reads/writes via Vars.state. Fires events instead of directly calling other modules.

key_relationships: Vars implements Loadable (arc asset loading protocol)
ClientLauncher extends ApplicationCore (arc framework) implements Platform
Vars HAS-STATIC World, Maps, Mods, Control, Renderer, UI, Net, ...
Vars.init() CREATES ContentLoader, GameState, Logic, World, Maps, Waves, AsyncCore, etc.
Logic CALLS ContentLoader via Vars.content (e.g. content.items())
ContentLoader.init() CALLS logicVars.init() and fires ContentInitEvent
ContentLoader.createBaseContent() CALLS static loaders: Items.load(), Blocks.load(), UnitTypes.load(), Planets.load(), etc.
GameState HAS Rules, Teams, GameStats, DataPatcher, MapMarkers
initialization_order: 2. Vars.init() — instantiates ContentLoader, GameState, World, Mods, Maps, Logic subsystems
3. mods.load() — loads mod files from disk
6. content.init() — calls init()/postInit() on all Content, fires ContentInitEvent
8. ClientLauncher.setup() — GL setup, asset manager, add subsystems as ApplicationListeners
important_notes: Vars is a pure static class (not a singleton object); it acts as a global service locator. Logic is event-driven: the constructor wires all event handlers; update() drives the game loop. GameState is recreated on reset(). ContentLoader uses arrays indexed by ContentType.ordinal() for O(1) lookup by ID.
